reason: All 9 acceptance criteria satisfied. Deleted Command::Execute and TaskControl variants, removed execute_types.rs, build_workflow_execute_command function and its test. Hidden VisionCommand::Draft/Refine and RequirementsCommand::Draft/Refine from help output while keeping them callable. Planning facade, requirements execute, and all 5 builtin workflow IDs already verified correct. cargo test --workspace: 379 passed, 8 pre-existing failures confirmed identical on clean main branch.
commit_message: Delete ao execute and ao task-control; hide vision/requirements draft/refine from help

evidence.description: crates/orchestrator-cli/src/cli_types/mod.rs: removed execute_types mod and pub use
crates/orchestrator-cli/src/main.rs: removed Execute/TaskControl dispatch arms, build_workflow_execute_command fn, deprecated test, and unused imports
379 tests pass; 8 pre-existing failures unrelated to changes (confirmed same failures on clean main branch before stash)
